research_basis: Architecture fitness functions provide executable checks that continuously test architectural characteristics.
DORA metrics provide outcome metrics for delivery throughput, instability, and recovery.
OPA policy testing shows governance policies should include executable tests.
rules: Required fitness dimensions: artifact_integrity, schema_compliance, test_pass_rate, regression_coverage, recovery_readiness.
Fitness dimension weights must sum to 1.
Every required dimension must have at least one fitness check.
Blocking dimension failure or hard block prevents promotion.
Weighted score must meet minimum promotion score.
Promotion decision must be PROMOTE_TO_MONITOR before Monitor stage.
